[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Greeve''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]] lead by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was a scout, and was recruited for General [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine's]] commandos while working as a forest guide on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He was also a sharpshooter and used one of the rifles brought from [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] by [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Janse]].
